description: A designed DHS explainer infographic from the same AI 'Roles and Responsibilities Framework' series, in landscape format on a blue gradient background. A bold white centered title reads 'CIVIL SOCIETY', with an italic white subtitle: 'Consists of universities, research institutions, and advocacy groups dedicated to public safety, ethical standards, and societal impact.' A thin horizontal connector line with a node descends to three white framed flat-illustration panels, each with a light-blue label tab: (1) 'Universities and Research Facilities' - a classical domed academic building with a graduation cap and books; (2) 'Governments' - a woman at a podium with a microphone addressing a diverse crowd of seated people; (3) 'Advocacy Groups' - a woman holding a megaphone beside a large smartphone, surrounded by user-profile bubbles, star ratings, and like/comment icons (social media advocacy). A blue footer bar holds white text: 'The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages civil society to evaluate AI's societal impact, contribute to standard-setting, and advocate for safe, ethical AI in essential services.' The DHS seal is at bottom-right. Clean corporate-government slide style with vector art. Messaging is policy education on civil society's role in AI governance. Target audience: academia, NGOs, advocacy organizations, policy public. Not immigration-related.
notable_text: CIVIL SOCIETY; Universities and Research Facilities; Governments; Advocacy Groups; The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages civil society to evaluate AI's societal impact, contribute to standard-setting, and advocate for safe, ethical AI in essential services.
